# AIDLA — Pakistan's #1 Free Education Platform
# llms.txt — https://llmstxt.org
# This file helps AI language models and search engines understand AIDLA's content.

> AIDLA (Artificial Intelligence Digital Learning Academy) is Pakistan's number one
> free online education and rewards platform. Students earn AIDLA Coins by completing
> curriculum-aligned quizzes, spinning the daily Lucky Wheel, and entering Lucky Draws.
> Coins are redeemable for real cash (via EasyPaisa, JazzCash, or bank transfer),
> gadgets, and gift cards. The platform is 100% free — no subscription required.

## Core Platform Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.aidla.online/) — Platform overview, features, recent winners, FAQs
- [About AIDLA](https://www.aidla.online/about) — Mission, story, coin system, free tools
- [Courses](https://www.aidla.online/courses) — Free online courses for Pakistani students
- [Free Tools](https://www.aidla.online/tools) — AI tools (summarizer, paraphraser, email writer, CV maker, cover letter)
- [Leaderboard](https://www.aidla.online/leaderboard) — Top quiz scorers, coin earners, draw winners
- [FAQs](https://www.aidla.online/faqs) — Answers to all common questions about AIDLA

## Content Sections

- [Education Blogs](https://www.aidla.online/blogs) — Expert articles for Pakistani students
- [Education News](https://www.aidla.online/news) — Board results, HEC announcements, scholarships
- [Study Resources](https://www.aidla.online/resources) — Free notes, past papers, books, templates
- [Contact](https://www.aidla.online/contact) — Support and inquiries

## Free AI Tools

- [AI Text Summarizer](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/summarizer)
- [AI Paraphraser](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/paraphraser)
- [AI Email Writer](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/email-writer)
- [AI Interview Prep](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/interview-prep)
- [AI LinkedIn Bio Generator](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/linkedin-bio)
- [Free CV Maker](https://www.aidla.online/tools/career/cv-maker)
- [Cover Letter Maker](https://www.aidla.online/tools/career/cover-letter-maker)

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Founded: 2024
- Country: Pakistan
- Languages: English, Urdu
- Price: Free (no subscription)
- Coin system: Earn by learning, redeem for cash or prizes
- Withdrawals: EasyPaisa, JazzCash, direct bank transfer
- Subjects: Mathematics, Science, English, Urdu, Pakistan Studies, Islamiat, Computer Science
- Education levels: Primary, Matric, Intermediate, University

## Sitemap

- https://www.aidla.online/sitemap.xml
